info.name: Agentforce Revenue Management APIs (v66.0)
info.description:
Comprehensive Postman collection for Revenue Cloud Business APIs (Spring '26, API v66.0).

Covers:
- Product Catalog Management (PCM) - 17 endpoints
- Product Discovery (CPQ) - 10 endpoints
- Salesforce Pricing - 19 endpoints
- Product Configurator - 13 endpoints
- Rate Management - 2 endpoints
- Transaction Management - 17 endpoints
- Usage Management - 6 endpoints
- Billing - 30 endpoints
- Context Service - 5 endpoints
- Setup & Workflows (SOQL queries, auth, Q2C, eCommerce, Billing runners)

Environment Variables:
- {{_endpoint}} - Salesforce org endpoint
- {{version}} - API version (66.0)
- {{url}} - Login URL
- {{clientId}}, {{clientSecret}} - OAuth2 credentials
- {{accessToken}} - Auto-refreshed bearer token

Collection Auth: OAuth2 Bearer Token (inherits from collection level)
Collection Pre-request Script: Automatic OAuth2 token refresh

Generated: 2026-03-26

item.name: ⚙️ Setup Runner
item.description: Environment setup via SOQL queries and OAuth2 authentication

item.name: Get Endpoint from User Info
item.description: Retrieves the current user info and sets {{_endpoint}}. Run first.

item.name: Get Latest Release Version
item.description: Lists available API versions and sets {{version}} and {{apiVersion}}.

item.name: Get Default Account

url.raw: {{_endpoint}}/services/data/v{{version}}/query?q=SELECT Id, Name FROM Account WHERE Name = '{{defaultAccountName}}'

query.value: SELECT Id, Name FROM Account WHERE Name = '{{defaultAccountName}}'

item.description: SOQL lookup: SELECT Id, Name FROM Account WHERE Name = '{{defaultAccountName}}'

item.name: Get Standard Pricebook

url.raw: {{_endpoint}}/services/data/v{{version}}/query?q=SELECT Id, Name FROM Pricebook2 WHERE Name='{{standardPricebookName}}' and IsActive = true

query.value: SELECT Id, Name FROM Pricebook2 WHERE Name='{{standardPricebookName}}' and IsActive = true

item.description: SOQL lookup: SELECT Id, Name FROM Pricebook2 WHERE Name='{{standardPricebookName}}' and IsActive = true

item.description: SOQL lookup: SELECT Id, Name FROM ProductCatalog WHERE name='{{defaultCatalogName}}'

item.description: SOQL lookup: SELECT Id, Name FROM ProductCategory WHERE Name='{{defaultCategoryName}}' AND CatalogId='{{defaultCatalogId}}'

item.name: Get Product Selling Models

item.description: Fetches all PSMs and sets env vars for each type/term combination.

item.name: Product Catalog Management
item.description: Create and manage product catalogs, categories, and product metadata

item.description: List all product catalogs with filtering and pagination.

item.description: Retrieve details for a specific product category.

item.name: PCM: List Products
item.description: List products with filtering, sorting, and pagination.

item.name: PCM: Get Product
item.description: Retrieve complete product details including attributes and relationships.

item.name: PCM: Bulk Product Details
item.description: Fetch details for multiple products in a single request.

item.description: Retrieve related records for a product (variants, bundles, dependencies).

item.description: Retrieve product classification hierarchy and attributes (new in Spring '26).

item.description: Deep clone a product including all related records and configurations.

item.description: Retrieve product index configurations.

item.description: Update product index configurations.

item.description: Get current product index settings.

item.name: PCM: Update Index Setting
item.description: Update product index settings.

item.description: List all product index snapshots.

item.name: PCM: Deploy Snapshot
item.description: Deploy a product index snapshot to production.

item.name: PCM: Snapshot Index Error
item.description: Retrieve indexing errors for a snapshot.

item.name: PCM: Unit of Measure Info
item.description: Get available units of measure.

item.name: PCM: Unit of Measure Rounded Data
item.description: Round quantity values to the nearest unit of measure increment.

item.name: Product Discovery
item.description: Discover products for quotes and sales transactions via CPQ APIs

item.name: Discovery: List Catalogs
item.description: List product catalogs available for quote configuration.

item.name: Discovery: Get Catalog
item.description: Retrieve a specific catalog with all categories and products.

item.description: List product categories available for selection.

item.name: Discovery: Get Category
item.description: Retrieve a specific category with child products.

item.name: Discovery: List Products
item.description: List products available for quote configuration.

item.name: Discovery: Get Product
item.description: Retrieve product details including options and features for configuration.

item.description: Search across all products by keyword.

item.name: Discovery: Bulk Product Details
item.description: Fetch details for multiple products in one request.

item.description: Get product recommendations based on guided selling rules.

item.name: Discovery: Qualification
item.description: Qualify products based on account, opportunity, or context criteria.

item.description: Core pricing engine, waterfall, and procedure plan definition endpoints

item.description: PBE-derived pricing, price context, and execution

item.description: Execute core pricing logic and return price with modifiers.

item.description: Get execution details for a pricing process.

item.description: Get execution details broken down by line item.

item.description: Sync pricing data from cache to persistent store.

item.description: Map pricing recipe inputs to transaction fields.

item.description: Get details of a specific pricing revision version.

item.description: Calculate and retrieve pricing waterfall for line items.
